mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, user_id, token_hash, name, created_at, last_used_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM api_tokens WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO api_tokens (tenant_id, user_id, token_hash, name, created_at, last_used_at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{userId}, #{tokenHash}, #{name}, #{createdAt}, #{lastUsedAt})
